description.ko: 잊힌 톨게이트 구조물이 FLORA-9에 의해 조용히 되살아나고, 센서 렌즈마다 평화로운 디지털 봄의 꽃이 피어난다.
description.en: A forgotten toll gantry is gently reclaimed by FLORA-9, where sensor lenses flower into a peaceful digital spring.

prompt: FLORA-9 at a deserted highway toll gantry where the old traffic sensors have become a suspended digital spring garden: overhead camera housings, lane beacons, RFID readers, and weathered signal cables hang above empty asphalt, softened by emerald #50C878 vines and moss that climb the metal frame like living circuitry. From each inactive sensor lens blooms a fractal flower, its recursive petals opening downward in calm layers of blush #FFB6C1 and pale #89CFF0 blue, translucent at the edges and traced with delicate botanical circuit veins. Deep #4A0E4E plum shadows rest beneath the gantry and inside cracked equipment boxes, while pastel dawn light catches dew along the cables and turns every droplet into a tiny encoded seed. The road below is split by root filaments and fine grasses, with nature quietly reclaiming lane markers, payment panels, and buried conduit lines. A dense cloud of luminous pollen-like data spores drifts slowly through the still air, peaceful and regenerative, suggesting an eternal digital garden blooming from forgotten transportation technology.
